summary: Case design for menu module is complete and testable. 10 cases covering tree structure, ordering, CRUD, business rules (delete-with-children), and circular-dependency protection. Layer assignments match proposal Layer Rationale. All required fields present, no forbidden content, no duplicates, traceability complete. TC-MENU-008 explicitly probes a suspected production bug (recursive infinite loop on circular parent_id); failure during execution will be classified as product issue per workflow contract. Two minor low-severity informational findings recorded for transparency, neither blocks planning.

findings.message: TC-MENU-007 and TC-MENU-008 assertions defer concrete error response shape to implementation ('具体错误形式由实现决定'). This is acceptable at case-design time because the API plan will pin down the exact response shape, but the api-plan reviewer should verify this is closed before codegen.
findings.suggestion: No fix required at case stage. aws-api-plan must specify exact assertion form (HTTP status / business code / msg pattern) for these two cases before codegen.

findings.message: Fixtures referenced in test_data (top_level_menu_factory, child_menu_factory, menu_with_children_factory) and cleanup strategy assume registration in .aws/data-knowledge.yaml; fact-baseline phase must confirm or extend the data knowledge registry before codegen.
findings.suggestion: Phase 3.5 (fact baseline) should validate that menu fixture capabilities exist in .aws/data-knowledge.yaml; if missing, plan to extend it before api-codegen.
